diff --git a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
@@ -23,10 +23,14 @@
 
 @router.post("/run", status_code=202)
 async def start_run(
     body: PipelineRunRequest,
     background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
 ) -> dict:
     """
     Start a new pipeline run in the background.
     """
+    # Input Validation Guard
+    if not body.diff_text or len(body.diff_text.strip()) < 10:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="diff_text must be at least 10 characters long.")
+        
     orchestrator = PipelineOrchestrator()
     # A temporary orchestration is needed to get the run_id before starting

scenarios.title: Valid Pipeline Run Initiation
scenarios.description: Verify that a valid POST request to /api/pipeline/run returns 202 Accepted with a run_id.
preconditions: API server is running on localhost:8000
scenarios.expected_result: Response contains valid UUID run_id and status 'queued'.

scenarios.title: Background Task Trigger Verification
scenarios.description: Ensure the background task is queued and status endpoint becomes available.
scenarios.expected_result: SSE stream opens and emits pipeline events.

scenarios.title: Report Generation After Completion
scenarios.description: Verify that completed run generates a report accessible via /api/reports.
scenarios.expected_result: New run_id appears in reports list with status 'completed'.

scenarios.title: Empty Request Body Handling
scenarios.description: Verify behavior when POST body is missing or empty.
scenarios.expected_result: API returns 422 Unprocessable Entity due to missing body.

scenarios.title: Invalid JSON Payload
scenarios.description: Verify server rejects malformed JSON in request body.

scenarios.title: Missing Required Label Field
scenarios.description: Verify validation error when required 'label' field is omitted.

scenarios.title: Concurrent Pipeline Requests
scenarios.description: Verify system handles multiple simultaneous run requests without ID collision.
scenarios.expected_result: All 5 requests return unique UUIDs and 202 status.

scenarios.title: Large Payload Size Boundary
scenarios.description: Verify behavior when request payload exceeds standard size limits.
scenarios.expected_result: Request either accepts or returns 413 Payload Too Large.

scenarios.title: Unauthorized Access Attempt
scenarios.description: Verify access control when authentication headers are missing.

scenarios.title: XSS Probe in Label Field
scenarios.description: Verify that script tags in label field are sanitized or stored safely.
scenarios.expected_result: Label is stored as text, script does not execute on retrieval.

generated_specs.content:
import os
import pytest
import json
import uuid
import time
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

BASE_URL = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
API_BASE = f"{BASE_URL}/api"

# SCENARIO_ID: 5da4ad91-9823-4760-84f2-737850e14468
def test_valid_pipeline_run_initiation_returns_202_and_run_id(page: Page):
    """Verify that a valid POST request to /api/pipeline/run returns 202 Accepted with a run_id."""
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest model definition not visible in context
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    expect(page.locator("html")).to_be_visible()

    payload = {"label": "smoke_test", "target_url": "https://example.com"}
    response = page.request.post(f"{API_BASE}/pipeline/run", json=payload)

    assert response.status_code == 202, f"Expected 202, got {response.status_code}"
    data = response.json()
    assert "run_id" in data, "Response missing run_id"
    assert uuid.UUID(data["run_id"]), "run_id is not a valid UUID"
    assert data.get("status") == "queued", "Status should be queued"


# SCENARIO_ID: 59927e15-0501-495d-8db2-446508c32bb3
def test_background_task_trigger_verification_sse_stream_opens(page: Page):
    """Ensure the background task is queued and status endpoint becomes available."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    expect(page.locator("html")).to_be_visible()

    # Initiate run first to get run_id
    init_payload = {"label": "sse_test", "target_url": "https://example.com"}
    init_response = page.request.post(f"{API_BASE}/pipeline/run", json=init_payload)
    assert init_response.status_code == 202
    run_id = init_response.json()["run_id"]

    # Check status endpoint
    status_response = page.request.get(f"{API_BASE}/pipeline/status/{run_id}")
    assert status_response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {status_response.status_code}"
    text = status_response.text()
    assert "event: pipeline_stage" in text, "SSE stream should contain pipeline_stage event"


# SCENARIO_ID: 109455bb-3ede-48df-924d-0f8348eecd21
def test_report_generation_after_completion_lists_new_run_id(page: Page):
    """Verify that completed run generates a report accessible via /api/reports."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    expect(page.locator("html")).to_be_visible()

    # Assume run completed (simulated by direct check)
    reports_response = page.request.get(f"{API_BASE}/reports")
    assert reports_response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {reports_response.status_code}"
    data = reports_response.json()
    assert isinstance(data, list), "Reports should be a list"
    # Verify structure exists (specific run_id check requires known ID from setup)
    if len(data) > 0:
        assert "run_id" in data[0], "Report entry missing run_id"


# SCENARIO_ID: 92f65715-3f11-466b-a794-fed13e846a23
def test_empty_request_body_handling_returns_422(page: Page):
    """Verify behavior when POST body is missing or empty."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    expect(page.locator("html")).to_be_visible()

    response = page.request.post(f"{API_BASE}/pipeline/run", json={})
    assert response.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422, got {response.status_code}"


# SCENARIO_ID: 68689f47-0b37-4774-91a8-09cf0bca80a4
def test_invalid_json_payload_returns_400(page: Page):
    """Verify server rejects malformed JSON in request body."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    expect(page.locator("html")).to_be_visible()

    # Playwright request handles JSON serialization, so we send raw data to simulate bad JSON if possible
    # Forcing raw content to simulate malformed JSON
    response = page.request.post(f"{API_BASE}/pipeline/run", data="{ invalid_json }")
    assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}"


# SCENARIO_ID: 4f91f49e-8c2e-47da-afb7-25f840613f94
def test_missing_required_label_field_returns_422(page: Page):
    """Verify validation error when required 'label' field is omitted."""
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest model definition not visible in context
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    expect(page.locator("html")).to_be_visible()

    payload = {"target_url": "https://example.com"}
    response = page.request.post(f"{API_BASE}/pipeline/run", json=payload)
    assert response.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422, got {response.status_code}"
    data = response.json()
    assert "detail" in data, "Response should contain detail"
    assert "label" in str(data["detail"]).lower(), "Error detail should mention label"


# SCENARIO_ID: e3966522-c649-44e3-a626-2115ed62b909
def test_concurrent_pipeline_requests_return_unique_ids(page: Page):
    """Verify system handles multiple simultaneous run requests without ID collision."""
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest model definition not visible in context
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    expect(page.locator("html")).to_be_visible()

    payload = {"label": "concurrent_test"}
    run_ids = []
    for _ in range(5):
        response = page.request.post(f"{API_BASE}/pipeline/run", json=payload)
        assert response.status_code == 202
        run_ids.append(response.json()["run_id"])

    assert len(run_ids) == 5, "Should have 5 run IDs"
    assert len(set(run_ids)) == 5, "All run IDs should be unique"


# SCENARIO_ID: b2b85a70-cb21-43b6-b59d-d56d96c19bce
def test_large_payload_size_boundary_handling(page: Page):
    """Verify behavior when request payload exceeds standard size limits."""
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest model definition not visible in context
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    expect(page.locator("html")).to_be_visible()

    large_string = "A" * (5 * 1024 * 1024)  # 5MB
    payload = {"label": large_string}
    response = page.request.post(f"{API_BASE}/pipeline/run", json=payload)
    assert response.status_code in [202, 413], f"Expected 202 or 413, got {response.status_code}"


# SCENARIO_ID: 32f692c4-d5ef-4301-b94a-6f88778a46ef
def test_unauthorized_access_attempt_returns_401(page: Page):
    """Verify access control when authentication headers are missing."""
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest model definition not visible in context
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    expect(page.locator("html")).to_be_visible()

    payload = {"label": "test"}
    # Do not send Authorization header
    response = page.request.post(f"{API_BASE}/pipeline/run", json=payload, headers={})
    assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}"


# SCENARIO_ID: b3555830-8672-465a-9e04-4008a7ad2feb
def test_xss_probe_in_label_field_sanitized(page: Page):
    """Verify that script tags in label field are sanitized or stored safely."""
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest model definition not visible in context
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    expect(page.locator("html")).to_be_visible()

    xss_payload = {"label": "<script>alert(1)</script>"}
    post_response = page.request.post(f"{API_BASE}/pipeline/run", json=xss_payload)
    assert post_response.status_code == 202

    reports_response = page.request.get(f"{API_BASE}/reports")
    assert reports_response.status_code == 200
    data = reports_response.json()
    # Verify label is stored as text, not executed (static check)
    found_entry = None
    for entry in data:
        if entry.get("label") == "<script>alert(1)</script>":
            found_entry = entry
            break
    assert found_entry is not None, "XSS payload should be stored as text"
    # In a real UI test, we would verify the script does not execute upon render
